title: Methodology consult: cross-asset wall-clock uniqueness redundancy assumption
why: ALL 2026-07-03 configurations (dense state 688.6/647.4, regime-gated pooled audit, ungated sparse cusum 19,659 raw -> 654 effective, 30x concurrency) converge to effective-N ~650-690 < floor 799 because pooled_avg_uniqueness treats simultaneous events on DIFFERENT names as fully redundant. AFML §4 uniqueness concerns overlapping outcomes on the SAME price path -- two correlated-but-distinct names are partially independent bets (Grinold breadth), so full cross-asset redundancy may massively over-shrink and structurally caps every pooled equity result. This is an empirical falsification of the 'sparse asynchronous events scale effective-N' premise (CUSUM bursts synchronize across names on market-wide information arrival), making this THE binding constraint.
value_rationale: Every downstream pooled-equity result is bounded by this decision; getting the cross-asset uniqueness methodology wrong either over-shrinks all pooled results (false negatives) or under-shrinks them (false positives) depending on direction.
scope: quant-phd-advisor consult grounded in the LdP corpus: correlation-weighted or beta-adjusted cross-asset uniqueness? Keep within-name overlap purge but discount cross-name concurrency by correlation?
Reviewed spec change to pipeline/sample_weights.pooled_avg_uniqueness with an A/B parity guard on the H4 path
recommendation: Consult BEFORE any further pooled equity runs -- every downstream result is bounded by this decision.

history.reason: logged from 2026-07-03 pooled-audit B0006 readout verification pass

quant-phd-advisor consult COMPLETE (2026-07-04). Key findings: (1) AFML 4.3 concurrency is SAME-price-path only (verified in exact text) - our full cross-asset redundancy rule is an extension beyond the book, and pipeline/sample_weights.py docstring already concedes it is the rho=1 conservative bound. (2) Observed effective-N convergence ~650-690 is the mathematical fingerprint of rho=1: breadth forced to ~1. With 35 large-caps at rho~0.4, equicorrelation ENB ~ 35/(1+34*0.4) ~ 2.3 contemporaneous independent bets - not 1, not 35. (3) RECOMMENDATION: decouple FIT-WEIGHT from INFERENCE effective-N. Fit-weight v2 = correlation-discounted concurrency c_t = 1 + sum rho*_ij (same asset rho*=1; cross-asset rho* = clip(denoised PIT EWMA rho, floor, 1)) - unstarves training. Inference/gate KEEPS the rho=1 conservative count (+ Meucci ENB as ceiling diagnostic); the gate must never use the generous number or PSR/DSR become theater. (4) Floor should compare against the conservative inference effective-N; honest possible outcome: 35 correlated large-caps on D1 may NEVER clear a 799 floor - a real finding, not a bug. (5) Mandatory validation before trusting v2: synthetic recovery test (reject if upward-biased), bit-identical single-asset H4 parity, phase-randomization placebo (credited ENB must not rise), gate monotonicity (v2 survivors must be subset of rho=1 survivors). Top false-edge risk: downward-biased PIT rho in calm regimes credits fake independence exactly when edges are least real. Sources: AFML 4.3-4.6, MLAM denoising, Meucci SSRN 1358533 (ENB). Next: human decision on promoting to spec.

Promoted to spec (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-04-b0012-uniqueness-v2-decoupling.md) + implementation plan (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-04-b0012-uniqueness-v2.md). 4 tasks: rho schedule+ENB, corr-discounted uniqueness+validation battery, runner fit_weight modes+unconditional effective-N persistence (absorbs B0011), A/B execution with gate-monotonicity verification.

Implementation landed (Tasks 1-3: rho schedule+ENB, corr-discounted uniqueness with full validation battery green, runner fit_weight modes + unconditional effective-N persistence). A/B execution starting: configs/equity_m3_cusum_cs_v2.yaml vs the 2026-07-03 rho1 cusum+CS run.

A/B executed and read (docs/superpowers/reports/2026-07-04-b0012-v2-ab-readout.md). Firewall PASS: effective_n_rho1=654.02 identical to rho1 run; stack 0/35 both runs; no v2-only survivor. fit_weight_sum=1714 (2.62x). ENB ceiling 26.1 at panel rho_mean 0.18 (spec guessed 2-3 at 0.4) — panel far less redundant than assumed; universe widening is a viable floor path. OOF skill unchanged (panel ROC-AUC 0.5403 vs 0.5405): starvation fixed but primary uninformative — binding constraint isolated. v2 stays default-recommended for pooled runs.
